steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Eneva indicators
from decimal import Decimal
# Given values
price = Decimal('13.35')
shares_issued = Decimal('1584698000')
shares_treasury = Decimal('1202000')
shares_out = shares_issued - shares_treasury
# Balance sheet
total_assets = Decimal('52770780000.0')
current_assets = Decimal('8518296000.0')
cash = Decimal('3194255000.0')
financial_investments = Decimal('672057000.0')
disponibilidades = cash + financial_investments
# liabilities
current_liabilities = Decimal('5783912000.0')
fornecedores = Decimal('1660039000.0')
short_debt = Decimal('1369143000.0')
long_debt = Decimal('16017296000.0')
debt_gross = short_debt + long_debt
# equity
equity_consolidated = Decimal('20214767000.0')
equity_parent = Decimal('18909488000.0')
non_controlling = Decimal('1305279000.0')
# income statement annual
revenue_12 = Decimal('11387505000.0')
ebit_12 = Decimal('2211909000.0')
net_income_12 = Decimal('549472000.0')
# parent attributable
net_income_parent = Decimal('42013000.0')
# YTD to Sep values (from quarter previous data)
revenue_ytd_sep = Decimal('6528950000.0')
ebit_ytd_sep = Decimal('2220602000.0')
net_income_ytd_sep = Decimal('1499056000.0')
# Depreciation etc (negative in statements) but absolute
depr = Decimal('1689626000.0')
# cash flow maybe
# Calculations
market_cap = price * shares_out
liquidity = disponibilidades
debt_net = debt_gross - disponib
# Wait variable not defined; compute properly
debt_net = debt_gross - disponibilidades
# 3-month figures = annual - ytd_sep
rev_3m = revenue_12 - revenue_ytd_sep
ebit_3m = ebit_12 - ebit_ytd_sep
net_3m = net_income_12 - net_income_ytd_sep
# Per-share metrics
lpa = net_income_parent / shares_out  # profit per share for parent
vpa = equity_parent / shares_out
ebit_per_share = ebit_12 / shares_out
revenue_per_share = revenue_12 / shares_out
assets_per_share = total_assets / shares_out
cap_giro = current_assets - current_liabilities
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares_out
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = cap_giro_per_share  # assume same
# multiples
pl = price / lpa if lpa != 0 else None
p_vp = price / vpa
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share
psr = price / revenue_per_share
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share != 0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro
# EV calculations
market_cap = market_cap.quantize(Decimal('1.'))
EV = market_cap + debt_gross - disponibilidades
# EBITDA
ebitda = ebit_12 + depr
# ratios
ev_ebitda = EV / ebitda if ebitda != 0 else None
ev_ebit = EV / ebit_12 if ebit_12 != 0 else None
# margins
marg_bruta = (Decimal('3953483000.0') / revenue_12) * 100
marg_ebit = (ebit_12 / revenue_12) * 100
marg_liq = (net_income_12 / revenue_12) * 100
ebit_over_assets = (ebit_12 / total_assets) * 100
# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = total_assets - fornecedores - cash
roic = (ebit_12 / roic_denom) * 100
roe = (net_income_12 / equity_consolidated) * 100
# Liquidity current ratio
liquidez_corr = current_assets / current_liabilities
# Debt/Equity
divbr_patrim = debt_gross / equity_consolidated
# Asset turnover
giro_ativos = revenue_12 / total_assets

from pprint import pprint
results = {
    'shares_out': int(shares_out),
    'market_cap': float(market_cap),
    'disponibilidades': float(disponibilidades),
    'ativo_circulante': float(current_assets),
    'div_bruta': float(debt_gross),
    'div_liquida': float(debt_net),
    'patr_liq': float(equity_consolidated),
    'receita_12': float(revenue_12),
    'ebit_12': float(ebit_12),
    'lucro_12': float(net_income_12),
    'receita_3m': float(rev_3m),
    'ebit_3m': float(ebit_3m),
    'lucro_3m': float(net_3m),
    'pl': float(pl) if pl else None,
    'p_vp': float(p_vp),
    'p_ebit': float(p_ebit),
    'psr': float(psr),
    'p_ativos': float(p_ativos),
    'p_cap_giro': float(p_cap_giro) if p_cap_giro else None,
    'p_ativ_circ_liq': float(p_ativ_circ_liq) if p_ativ_circ_liq else None,
    'ev_ebitda': float(ev_ebitda) if ev_ebitda else None,
    'ev_ebit': float(ev_ebit) if ev_ebit else None,
    'lpa': float(lpa),
    'vpa': float(vpa),
    'marg_bruta_pct': float(marg_bruta.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))),
    'marg_ebit_pct': float(marg_ebit.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))),
    'marg_liq_pct': float(marg_liq.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))),
    'ebit_over_assets_pct': float(ebit_over_assets.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))),
    'roic_pct': float(roic.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))),
    'roe_pct': float(roe.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))),
    'liquidez_corr': float(liquidez_corr),
    'divbr_patrim': float(divbr_patrim),
    'giro_ativos': float(giro_ativos),
    'EV': float(EV),
    'EBITDA': float(ebitda)
}

pprint(results)
print('\n--- Detailed computed values ---')
for k,v in results.items():
    print(k, v)

# print as numbers for JSON usage
print('\nRESULTS')
print(results)
"} }

{"inp":{"code":"from decimal import Decimal
price = Decimal('13.35')
shares_issued = Decimal('1584698000')
shares_treasury = Decimal('1202000')
shares_out = shares_issued - shares_treasury
# Balance sheet
total_assets = Decimal('52770780000.0')
current_assets = Decimal('8518296000.0')
cash = Decimal('3194255000.0')
financial_investments = Decimal('672057000.0')
disponibilidades = cash + financial_investments
# liabilities
current_liabilities = Decimal('5783912000.0')
fornecedores = Decimal('1660039000.0')
short_debt = Decimal('1369143000.0')
long_debt = Decimal('16017296000.0')
debt_gross = short_debt + long_debt
# equity
equity_consolidated = Decimal('20214767000.0')
equity_parent = Decimal('18909488000.0')
non_controlling = Decimal('1305279000.0')
# income statement annual
revenue_12 = Decimal('11387505000.0')
ebit_12 = Decimal('2211909000.0')
net_income_12 = Decimal('549472000.0')
# parent attributable
net_income_parent = Decimal('42013000.0')
# YTD to Sep values (from quarter previous data)
revenue_ytd_sep = Decimal('6528950000.0')
ebit_ytd_sep = Decimal('2220602000.0')
net_income_ytd_sep = Decimal('1499056000.0')
# Depreciation etc (absolute)
depr = Decimal('1689626000.0')

# Calculations
market_cap = price * shares_out
# Net debt
debt_net = debt_gross - disponibilidades
# 3-month figures = annual - ytd_sep
rev_3m = revenue_12 - revenue_ytd_sep
ebit_3m = ebit_12 - ebit_ytd_sep
net_3m = net_income_12 - net_income_ytd_sep
# Per-share metrics
lpa = net_income_parent / shares_out  # profit per share for parent
vpa = equity_parent / shares_out
ebit_per_share = ebit_12 / shares_out
revenue_per_share = revenue_12 / shares_out
assets_per_share = total_assets / shares_out
cap_giro = current_assets - current_liabilities
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares_out
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = cap_giro_per_share  # assume same
# multiples
pl = (price / lpa) if lpa != 0 else None
p_vp = price / vpa
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share
psr = price / revenue_per_share
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share
p_cap_giro = (price / cap_giro_per_share) if cap_giro_per_share != 0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro
# EV calculations
market_cap = market_cap.quantize(Decimal('1.'))
EV = market_cap + debt_gross - disponibilidades
# EBITDA
ebitda = ebit_12 + depr
# ratios
ev_ebitda = (EV / ebitda) if ebitda != 0 else None
ev_ebit = (EV / ebit_12) if ebit_12 != 0 else None
# margins
marg_bruta = (Decimal('3953483000.0') / revenue_12) * 100
marg_ebit = (ebit_12 / revenue_12) * 100
marg_liq = (net_income_12 / revenue_12) * 100
ebit_over_assets = (ebit_12 / total_assets) * 100
# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = total_assets - fornecedores - cash
roic = (ebit_12 / roic_denom) * 100
roe = (net_income_12 / equity_consolidated) * 100
# Liquidity current ratio
liquidez_corr = current_assets / current_liabilities
# Debt/Equity
divbr_patrim = debt_gross / equity_consolidated
# Asset turnover
giro_ativos = revenue_12 / total_assets

results = {
    'shares_out': int(shares_out),
    'market_cap': float(market_cap),
    'disponibilidades': float(disponibilidades),
    'ativo_circulante': float(current_assets),
    'div_bruta': float(debt_gross),
    'div_liquida': float(debt_net),
    'patr_liq': float(equity_consolidated),
    'receita_12': float(revenue_12),
    'ebit_12': float(ebit_12),
    'lucro_12': float(net_income_12),
    'receita_3m': float(rev_3m),
    'ebit_3m': float(ebit_3m),
    'lucro_3m': float(net_3m),
    'pl': float(pl) if pl else None,
    'p_vp': float(p_vp),
    'p_ebit': float(p_ebit),
    'psr': float(psr),
    'p_ativos': float(p_ativos),
    'p_cap_giro': float(p_cap_giro) if p_cap_giro else None,
    'p_ativ_circ_liq': float(p_ativ_circ_liq) if p_ativ_circ_liq else None,
    'ev_ebitda': float(ev_ebitda) if ev_ebitda else None,
    'ev_ebit': float(ev_ebit) if ev_ebit else None,
    'lpa': float(lpa),
    'vpa': float(vpa),
    'marg_bruta_pct': float(marg_bruta.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))),
    'marg_ebit_pct': float(marg_ebit.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))),
    'marg_liq_pct': float(marg_liq.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))),
    'ebit_over_assets_pct': float(ebit_over_assets.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))),
    'roic_pct': float(roic.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))),
    'roe_pct': float(roe.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))),
    'liquidez_corr': float(liquidez_corr),
    'divbr_patrim': float(divbr_patrim),
    'giro_ativos': float(giro_ativos),
    'EV': float(EV),
    'EBITDA': float(ebitda)
}

import json
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))
"} }
